name: Bhai Raghbir Singh Zakhmi
body: Bhai Raghbir Singh Zakhmi is the son of late Bhai Dharam Singh Zakhmi. His siblings include Bhai Amrik Singh Zakhmi, Bhai Surjit Singh Zakhmi, Bhai Hariqbal Singh Zakhmi and Bhai Brat Pal Singh Zakhmi. Having received training from his father and Prof. Darshan Singh Komal, he is adept in Gurmat Sangeet and continues to sing the compositions passed down to him. He has also accompanied late Bhai Charanjit Singh Thawar on the side harmonium and vocals during a tour to Singapore and Malaysia. Currently, Bhai Raghbir Singh Ji is based in Seattle, USA. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Raghbir Singh Ji, please contact us.
